messages.content:
Summarize the CVE description using clear cybersecurity terminology.

Cross Site Scripting vulnerability found in NetScoutnGeniusOne v.6.3.4 allows a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code via the creator parameter of the Alert Configuration page.
A Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in NetScout nGeniusOne version 6.3.4 permits remote attackers to execute arbitrary code through the creator parameter on the Alert Configuration page.
